Fields

esriSQL_ALL = 2

2: SQL ALL clause.

esriSQL_AS = 4

4: SQL AS clause.

esriSQL_DISTINCT = 1

1: SQL Distinct clause.

esriSQL_EXPRESSION = 512

512: SQL Expression.

esriSQL_FROM = 64

esriSQL_GROUP_BY = 16
